company_registration.title: Registering a Company with SECP

steps.action: Choose company type and reserve a name
steps.details: Check name availability and choose private limited, single-member company, or another suitable form.
Prepare memorandum/articles or standard forms, subscriber details, registered office, and director information.

steps.action: Submit incorporation through SECP eServices or CRO
steps.details: Upload documents, pay the fee, and respond to any SECP observations.

required_documents.name_en: CNIC Copies of Subscribers and Directors
required_documents.name_ur: سبسکرائبرز اور ڈائریکٹرز کے شناختی کارڈ

required_documents.name_en: Memorandum and Articles or Standard Incorporation Forms

office.name: SECP Company Registration Office
office.note: Most filings can be completed through SECP eServices

company_registration.estimated_cost: Varies by company type, authorized capital, and SECP fee schedule

shareholder_rights.title: Using Shareholder Rights in a Company

steps.action: Identify the right or record needed
steps.details: Clarify whether the issue is inspection, dividend, voting, transfer of shares, oppression, or meeting notice.

steps.action: Send a written request to the company
steps.details: Address the company secretary or registered office and keep proof of delivery.

steps.action: Escalate to SECP or court if ignored
steps.details: Use SECP complaint channels or legal proceedings depending on the right violated and relief required.

required_documents.source: Share certificate, CDC record, or company register
Emails, notices, letters, or courier record

office.name: SECP or Company Registered Office
office.note: Start with the company record holder; escalate to SECP when appropriate

shareholder_rights.estimated_cost: Low for written request; varies if SECP complaint or litigation is needed

financial_statement_filing.title: Preparing and Filing Company Financial Statements

steps.details: Compile accounting records, bank statements, invoices, tax records, and management information.

steps.action: Get required approvals and audit if applicable
steps.details: Directors approve accounts and arrange audit or review where the law requires it.

steps.action: File returns and statements with SECP
steps.details: Submit the applicable statutory forms and financial statements through SECP eServices or CRO.

office.name: SECP eServices or Company Registration Office
office.note: Check filing category and deadline under current SECP requirements

financial_statement_filing.estimated_cost: Depends on accountant, audit, and SECP filing requirements
financial_statement_filing.estimated_timeline: 2-8 weeks depending on record quality and audit need
financial_statement_filing.relevant_law: Companies Act, 2017; Companies Regulations, 2024; SECP guide on financial statements
